title: SQL Query for Customer Demographics
scenario: Write a SQL query to retrieve the age, country, and city of all customers who have made a purchase in the past 6 months. The output should display the customer demographics in a single row per customer.
constraints: Must use the WHERE clause to filter purchase dates
Must use the GROUP BY clause to group customers by demographics

evaluationCriteria.description: The query should be syntactically valid SQL
The query should meet the specified constraints
The query should accurately retrieve the customer demographics
